✦ MSc Mathematics · Leeds

About me

Data tells a story.
I tell it beautifully.

I'm Christiana — a data analyst at Admiral Group with an MSc in Mathematics from the University of Leeds. I combine a rigorous mathematical background with hands-on experience building dashboards, analysing cybersecurity data, and presenting insights to audiences of 100+.

I'm driven by curiosity, love cross-functional collaboration, and bring a global perspective shaped by living and working across the UK and Cyprus. Outside of data, you'll find me scouting, travelling the Med, or on a badminton court.
